question.content: Compound A undergoes acid hydrolysis and forms one carboxylic acid together with ethanol. Write the structural formula of that carboxylic acid. Answer format: one condensed structural formula in ASCII; write only the formula, with no explanatory text, spaces, or equals sign.

step_1.content: Identify A as a diethyl diester and select the hydrolyzable ester groups under acidic conditions.
step_1.key_point: Both ester groups convert to carboxyl groups after hydrolysis.

step_3.content: Replace each OEt fragment with OH while keeping the carbon skeleton unchanged.
step_3.key_point: The product acid skeleton is HOOC-CH2-COOH.
